requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 / 射频干扰
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 / 射頻干擾

summary.en: Cambodia has no standalone EMC regulation; radio/telecom equipment must pass MPTC type approval which includes EMC parameters within the technical file review. CAMCONTROL may inspect imported goods for compliance with general product quality requirements at the border.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨无独立电磁兼容法规；无线/电信设备须通过 MPTC 型式认证，型式认证技术文件审查中包含电磁兼容参数。CAMCONTROL 可在边境对进口商品的通用产品质量要求进行检验。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨無獨立電磁相容法規；無線／電信設備須通過 MPTC 型式認證，型式認證技術文件審查中包含電磁相容參數。CAMCONTROL 可在邊境對進口商品的通用產品品質要求進行檢驗。

standards_or_laws: MPTC Prakas on Type Approval of Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment
Sub-Decree No. 209 ANK/BK on Product Quality (2015)

summary.en: China requires SRRC radio type approval and CCC certification (which incorporates EMC testing per GB 9254 / GB/T 17626 series) for radio and telecom terminal equipment.
summary.zh: 中国无线及电信终端设备须取得 SRRC 无线电型号核准及 CCC 认证（包含依据 GB 9254 / GB/T 17626 系列标准的电磁兼容测试）。
summary.zht: 中國無線及電信終端設備須取得 SRRC 無線電型號核准及 CCC 認證（包含依據 GB 9254 / GB/T 17626 系列標準的電磁相容測試）。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval (Ministry of Industry and Information Technology)

gap.en: SRRC and CCC EMC certificates are NOT recognised by MPTC or CAMCONTROL. A fresh technical file with test reports must be prepared for MPTC type approval. Chinese-standard EMC test reports may be used as supporting evidence but will not substitute for MPTC submission.
gap.zh: SRRC 及 CCC 电磁兼容证书不被 MPTC 或 CAMCONTROL 认可。需为 MPTC 型式认证重新准备包含测试报告的技术文件。中国标准电磁兼容测试报告可作为佐证，但不可替代向 MPTC 提交的申请文件。
gap.zht: SRRC 及 CCC 電磁相容證書不被 MPTC 或 CAMCONTROL 認可。需為 MPTC 型式認證重新準備包含測試報告的技術文件。中國標準電磁相容測試報告可作為佐證，但不可替代向 MPTC 提交的申請文件。

mandatory_status.target: mandatory (within MPTC type approval technical file)

source.publisher: Ministry of Post and Telecommunications of Cambodia (MPTC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance for Cambodia is assessed within the MPTC type approval process; there is no separate EMC certificate. Chinese SRRC/CCC test data may support but cannot replace the MPTC filing. Verify current MPTC technical requirements before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨电磁兼容合规性在 MPTC 型式认证流程内评估，无需单独电磁兼容证书。中国 SRRC/CCC 测试数据可作为支持材料，但不能替代 MPTC 申报文件。提交前请核实 MPTC 最新技术要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨電磁相容合規性在 MPTC 型式認證流程內評估，無需單獨電磁相容證書。中國 SRRC/CCC 測試數據可作為支持材料，但不能替代 MPTC 申報文件。提交前請核實 MPTC 最新技術要求。

summary.en: CAMCONTROL (Ministry of Commerce) may conduct physical quality and conformity inspection of imported electronics at the port of entry. Importers should hold documentation demonstrating product safety and conformity (e.g. MPTC type approval certificate, test reports). Risk-based inspection; not every shipment is checked.
summary.zh: 商务部下属的 CAMCONTROL 可在入境口岸对进口电子产品进行实物质量及合规检验。进口商应持有证明产品安全与合规的文件（如 MPTC 型式认证证书、测试报告）。检验基于风险评估，并非每批货物均受查验。
summary.zht: 商務部下屬的 CAMCONTROL 可在入境口岸對進口電子產品進行實物品質及合規檢驗。進口商應持有證明產品安全與合規的文件（如 MPTC 型式認證證書、測試報告）。檢驗基於風險評估，並非每批貨物均受查驗。

standards_or_laws: Sub-Decree No. 209 ANK/BK on Product Quality (2015)

summary.en: China conducts customs and CIQ (China Inspection and Quarantine) checks at border; CCC certification is the primary documentary requirement for covered product categories.
summary.zh: 中国在边境进行海关及 CIQ（中国检验检疫）查验；CCC 认证是涵盖产品类别的主要文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國在邊境進行海關及 CIQ（中國檢驗檢疫）查驗；CCC 認證是涵蓋產品類別的主要文件要求。

gap.en: CAMCONTROL operates independently from MPTC. Holding an MPTC type approval certificate significantly reduces CAMCONTROL inspection risk, but does not eliminate it. Chinese CCC documentation does not satisfy CAMCONTROL requirements; local importer must present valid Cambodian compliance documents.
gap.zh: CAMCONTROL 独立于 MPTC 运作。持有 MPTC 型式认证证书可显著降低 CAMCONTROL 查验风险，但不能完全消除。中国 CCC 文件不满足 CAMCONTROL 要求；当地进口商须出示有效的柬埔寨合规文件。
gap.zht: CAMCONTROL 獨立於 MPTC 運作。持有 MPTC 型式認證證書可顯著降低 CAMCONTROL 查驗風險，但不能完全消除。中國 CCC 文件不滿足 CAMCONTROL 要求；當地進口商須出示有效的柬埔寨合規文件。

source.publisher: CAMCONTROL — Ministry of Commerce of Cambodia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ensure the local Cambodian importer/agent holds the MPTC type approval certificate and can present it to CAMCONTROL at the border. Chinese CCC documents alone are insufficient. Verify current CAMCONTROL product categories subject to mandatory inspection before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 确保柬埔寨当地进口商/代理持有 MPTC 型式认证证书，并可在边境向 CAMCONTROL 出示。仅凭中国 CCC 文件不足够。发货前请核实 CAMCONTROL 目前须强制检验的产品类别。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 確保柬埔寨當地進口商／代理持有 MPTC 型式認證證書，並可在邊境向 CAMCONTROL 出示。僅憑中國 CCC 文件不足夠。發貨前請核實 CAMCONTROL 目前須強制檢驗的產品類別。
